disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe abdominal bloating and visible distension with cramping periumbilical pain and excessive gas coming on within about 20 minutes of eating
trigger_question_examples: Tell me what happens when you eat.
When does the bloating come on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Within about 20 minutes of eating anything my belly blows up tight like a balloon, I get blinding cramping gas pain around my belly button and loads of wind.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chronic watery diarrhoea and frequent loose stools over about four months
trigger_question_examples: What are your bowel motions like?
How long has the diarrhoea been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had watery diarrhoea and loose stools for about four months, and after meals it's explosive and I have to rush to the toilet.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Intermittent bulky, pale, greasy, foul-smelling stools that float
trigger_question_examples: Are your stools ever pale, greasy or hard to flush?
Do your stools float or smell unusually foul?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, sometimes my poo is bulky, pale and greasy-looking, it floats and smells really foul.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unintentional weight loss and generalised fatigue
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight without trying?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I think I've dropped a few kilos without trying and I feel tired all the time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: History of previous abdominal surgery with reported sluggish gut motility
trigger_question_examples: Have you ever had any abdominal or bowel surgery?
Any past operations on your tummy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I had abdominal surgery a while back and was told afterwards that my gut doesn't move things along properly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms worsened after taking over-the-counter probiotic supplements
trigger_question_examples: Have you tried anything for it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I tried over-the-counter probiotics hoping they'd help but they actually made the gas and bloating worse, so I've stopped them.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reduced oral intake from food avoidance with symptoms of feeling dried out and drained
trigger_question_examples: How much are you managing to eat and drink?
Do you feel dehydrated at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've basically stopped eating because of the attacks, and between that and the diarrhoea I feel really dried out and drained.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Continues to pass wind and stool normally; no vomiting and no absolute constipation
trigger_question_examples: Are you still passing wind and opening your bowels?
Any vomiting, or have things stopped moving completely?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm still passing plenty of wind and having diarrhoea, and I'm not vomiting — if anything things are moving too much, not blocked up.
